title: Bogoria beccarii
taxonomy: Bogoria beccarii is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is native to New Guinea and is a type of epiphytic orchid. The classification of Bogoria beccarii is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Angiospermophyta, Class: Liliopsida, Order: Asparagales, Family: Orchidaceae, Genus: Bogoria, Species: B. beccarii. This classification reflects its relationship to other plants and its unique characteristics. Further study of Bogoria beccarii is needed to fully understand its classification within the plant kingdom.

intro: Bogoria beccarii is a plant species belonging to the family Burseraceae, commonly known as the torchwood tree or bogor tree.
